mapper.select: /* AdminUserMapper.selectUserDetail */ SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId ,AUTH_GRP_CD AS authGrpCd ,MEMBER_NM AS memberNm ,MEMBER_PW AS memberPw ,MASTER_CODE AS masterCode ,MEMBER_EMAIL AS memberEmail ,MEMBER_BRTHDY AS memberBrthdy ,MEMBER_PHONE AS memberPhone ,MEMBER_POST AS memberPost ,MEMBER_ADDR AS memberAddr ,MEMBER_ADDR_DETL AS memberAddrDetl ,CONFM_YN AS confmYn ,JOIN_DE AS joinDe ,CONFM_ID AS confmId ,CONFM_DT AS confmDt ,PASSWORD_UPD_DT AS passwordUpdDt ,LAST_LOGIN_DT AS lastLoginDt ,USE_YN AS useYn ,UPD_ID AS updId ,DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updDt ,FAIL_CNT AS failCnt FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
